title: Verify the presence of short reviews
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Verify that the title '1 条点评' (1 short review) is displayed.
expected_result: The title '1 条点评' (1 short review) is displayed.

title: Verify the absence of long reviews
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Verify that the subtitle '0 条长评' (0 long reviews) is displayed.
expected_result: The subtitle '0 条长评' (0 long reviews) is displayed.

title: Verify the presence of a placeholder image
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Verify that a placeholder image of a chair is displayed in the main content area.
expected_result: A placeholder image of a chair is displayed in the main content area.

title: Verify the footer text
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Verify that the footer text '1 条短评' (1 short review) is displayed.
expected_result: The footer text '1 条短评' (1 short review) is displayed.

title: Verify the back arrow functionality
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that the user is navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Verify the pencil icon functionality
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Click on the pencil icon in the header. | Verify that the user is navigated to the edit review screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the edit review screen.

title: Verify the absence of long reviews
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Click on the subtitle '0 条长评' (0 long reviews). | Verify that no long reviews are displayed.

title: Verify the presence of short reviews
preconditions: The user is logged in and on the feedback review screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the feedback review screen. | Click on the title '1 条点评' (1 short review). | Verify that short reviews are displayed.
